rationale: Bug hunt revealed C21 dashboard claim was ghost code (status files updated but code never pushed). Implemented dashboard for real: 5 faction mini-bars (DRU/ANC/KOR/NIA/ANK) with CRT-styled ProgressBars, tier letters (H=80+/S=50+/N=20+/X=<20), Anam diamond counter, Runes ogham counter. Signal-driven updates via reputation_changed. Positioned below chronicle header with responsive width (88% mobile, 60% desktop). BiomeRadial upgraded: 8th biome iles_mystiques added to all data arrays + procedural island icon. Font size 14px (was 11) per creator answer q-20260414-008. Maturity system: global score from MATURITY_WEIGHTS (runs*2+endings*5+oghams*3+max_rep), amber progress ring on locked biomes, threshold number in label, click prevention on locked. Dynamic angle_step for 8-biome arc.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C22 (verify dashboard signal lifecycle — store may load after HubAntre _ready(); test _update_dashboard_data with empty meta; verify maturity ring rendering at edge progress values 0.99/1.0). Then feature: activate BiomeRadial in _on_partir_pressed() — currently bypassed with hardcoded foret_broceliande. Wire radial.open() so players can actually select biomes. This is a key UX gap: 8 biomes exist but only Broceliande is reachable.
